expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算橱柜的板材尺寸。[宽度]、[高度]、[深度] 是总尺寸，[板材厚度] 是顶板、底板和侧板的材料厚度，[后板厚度] 是背景板的材料厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] ialah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan Papan Atas, Bawah dan Sisi, [BackBoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan Papan Latar. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] adalah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan Papan Atas, Bawah, dan Samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan Papan Belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดแผ่นไม้สำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height],[Depth] คือขนาดทั้งหมด, [BoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นไม้ด้านบน, ด้านล่าง และด้านข้าง, [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นพื้นหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước bảng cho tủ. [Width], [Height],[Depth] là kích thước tổng thể, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của bảng Trên, Dưới và Bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của bảng Lưng. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga sukat ng tabla para sa kabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] ang kabuuang Sukat, [BoardThick] ang kapal ng materyal para sa Itaas, Ibaba at Gilid na Tabla, [BackBoardThick] ang kapal ng materyal para sa Background na Tabla. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: တန်း၏အရွယ်အစားများကိုတွက်ချက်ပါ။ [WIDTH]၊ [Height] နှင့် [Depth] သည်စုစုပေါင်းတိုင်းတာခြင်းဖြစ်သည်, [BoardThick] သည် အပေါ်၊ အောက်နှင့်ဘေးဘက် သစ်သား အထူဖြစ်ပြီး, [BackBoardThick] သည် နောက်ခံသစ်သား အထူဖြစ်သည်။ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនា​ទំហំ​ក្តារ​សម្រាប់​ទូ។ [Width], [Height],[Depth] ជា​ទំហំ​សរុប, [BoardThick] គឺ​ជា​កម្រាស់​នៃ​សម្ភារៈក្តារ​លើនិង​ខាងក្រោម និង​ខាងដើម, [BackBoardThick] គឺ​ជា​កម្រាស់​នៃសម្ភារៈ​ក្រោយ។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຄິດໄລ່ຂະໜາດບອດສໍາລັບຕູ້. [Width], [Height],[Depth] ແມ່ນຂະໜາດທັງໝົດ, [BoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມໜາຂອງວັດຖຸໃຊ້ໃນສ່ວນບອດຂ້າງເທິງ, ຂ້າງລຸ່ມ ແລະຂ້າງຂ້າງ, [BackBoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມໜາຂອງວັດຖຸໃຊ້ໃນບອດສ່ວນຂ້າງຫລັງ. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ja: キャビネットのボードサイズを計算します。[Width], [Height],[Depth]は総寸法であり、[BoardThick]は上部、下部、および側面のボードの材料厚み、[BackBoardThick]は背景ボードの材料厚みです。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.ko: 캐비닛의 보드 크기를 계산합니다. [Width], [Height],[Depth]는 전체 치수이며, [BoardThick]는 상단, 하단 및 측면 보드 재료 두께, [BackBoardThick]는 배경 보드 재료 두께입니다. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.es: Calcula los tamaños de los paneles para un gabinete. [Width], [Height],[Depth] es la medida total, [BoardThick] es el grosor del material para los paneles superior, inferior y laterales, [BackBoardThick] es el grosor del material del panel trasero. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.fr: Calcule les dimensions des panneaux pour un meuble. [Width], [Height],[Depth] correspondent à la mesure totale, [BoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau des panneaux supérieurs, inférieurs et latéraux, [BackBoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau du panneau arrière. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.de: Berechnet die Plattengrößen für einen Schrank. [Width], [Height],[Depth] ist die Gesamtmessung, [BoardThick] ist die Materialdicke für obere, untere und seitliche Platten, [BackBoardThick] ist die Materialdicke der Rückwandplatte. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.hi: कैबिनेट के लिए बोर्ड के आकार की गणना करें। [Width], [Height],[Depth] कुल माप हैं, [BoardThick] शीर्ष, निचले और साइड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है, [BackBoardThick] बैकग्राउंड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है। (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ru: Вычисляет размеры досок для шкафа. [Width], [Height],[Depth] — это общие размеры, [BoardThick] — толщина материала для верхней, нижней и боковых досок, [BackBoardThick] — толщина материала для задней доски. (AI translated, please check)
